name: ceylon-hop-site
description: Static marketing/booking site + SEO route-page generator. (No type:module — serve-booking.js is CommonJS; the generator uses .mjs, which is ESM by extension.)

scripts.generate: node tools/generate-pricing.mjs && node tools/generate-route-pages.mjs && node tools/generate-static-pages.mjs && node tools/generate-redirects.mjs
